project.name: firefly-imu-carrier
project.description: 2-layer carrier PCB for the XIAO nRF52840 Sense Plus: adds a LIS3MDL magnetometer (9-DOF) + swappable LiPo input (JST-PH) with reverse-polarity protection. See firefly-imu-carrier-design-brief.md

input.type: LiPo 1S via JST-PH 2.0mm; USB-C charging through the XIAO onboard BQ25101
input.protection: High-side logic-level P-FET (DMG2305UX / AO3401), reverse-polarity, before the BAT pad

size.note: Preliminary: XIAO module 21x17.5mm + room for JST/Q1/passives. Confirm during layout.

interfaces.detail: nRF52840 BLE 5.4; custom GATT; 20-byte notify (10x int16). Keep the existing UUIDs/packet.

interfaces.notes: Silkscreen +/- polarity unambiguously. Power pad = VBAT (Plus pad 32), NOT the GPIO P0.31_D16_BAT (pad 20, ADC sense only).

layout_constraints.antenna_keepout: No copper/plane under the XIAO antenna edge (priority #1 for BLE range).
layout_constraints.magnetometer_isolation: Place U2 in the corner farthest from antenna, battery, charge traces, USB-C and inductors.
layout_constraints.decoupling: C1/C2 within <2mm of U2; pull-ups near the bus.
layout_constraints.i2c: Short, direct SDA/SCL, away from the battery path.
layout_constraints.access: USB-C and reset button reachable; expose SWD pads if practical.
